title: 完成评审整改最终验收与发布证据闭环

sources.reason: Review-backed remediation inventory and completion criteria.
Release distribution gate that validates immutable tag evidence.
PR aggregate gate for archived Work Item evidence.
Archived Work Item contracts and summaries used for remediation traceability.
Canonical project and governance verification commands.

riskAssessment.reason: The local release evidence and the already published immutable tag may represent different release units; the gate must preserve that distinction.

executionDecision.reason: The acceptance scope and external release evidence boundary are explicit.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm the final verdict distinguishes current-branch verification from immutable published-tag verification.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: All review remediation Work Items through N18 are archived with valid Contract/Summary evidence and no unowned active changes remain after this Work Item is archived.
The target-base PR aggregate gate and the complete project quality/governance suite are executed and their results are recorded in the Summary.
Release distribution verification checks immutable tag contents for release.json, installer, lock, SBOM, and provenance without accepting worktree evidence as tag evidence.
Any remaining failure is classified as an actionable external release-publication prerequisite, with no false ready or complete verdict.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The review requires a final self-check after the remediation sequence. Local code and governance checks can pass while an already published immutable tag still lacks the evidence claimed by the current release metadata.
constraints: Do not rewrite historical Work Item archives.
Do not weaken release or PR gates to make an external tag mismatch disappear.
Do not push or mutate the public repository from this Work Item.
intent.rationale: A final evidence-only Work Item closes the remediation loop and leaves a precise release prerequisite when repository state outside the local worktree still prevents GO.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: All prior remediation Work Items are archived and the current target-base PR gate passes.
The complete local quality and governance suite passes from the current commit.
Release distribution verification either passes against the immutable tag or records the tag-publication prerequisite without accepting worktree evidence.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
